name: The Pearl
address: 180 High Park Lane, Silver Spring, MD 20910
approxRentRange: $2,900-$4,472/month for 2BR (multiple listing sources, mid-2026; listed starting prices range $3,040-$3,338 depending on source and availability)
bathroomsNote: 2BR floor plans carry 2 full baths per multiple listing sources. 1BR units are 1 bath. Units feature quartz countertops, double vanities, and bathtubs per listing descriptions.

notes.doormanDetail: RentCafe listing states '24-hour concierge service.' Multiple resident reviews on ApartmentRatings and search-aggregated sources name specific overnight concierge staff by name (Gerald, Sandy) and describe them as always present. Rated Confirmed 24h.
notes.building: LEED-certified luxury high-rise, 14 stories, 284 units, built 2017 by The Tower Companies. First Fitwel-certified multifamily building in the world. Located in The Blairs District, approximately 0.4 miles from Silver Spring Metro (Red Line).
notes.amenities: Aquaterra rooftop saltwater pool with cabanas and sunning ledges; two-story fitness center with free weekly classes; wellness kitchen; WorkLab WiFi co-working lounge; Board Room; on-site urban farm; dog park and pet spa; EV charging; Zipcar car sharing; package lockers; reservable guest suite; valet dry cleaning; bike room; controlled access.
notes.balconyDetail: Private balconies available on select units across multiple tiers: standard, long, double, and penthouse double balcony. Not every unit includes a balcony; presence depends on specific unit selection.
notes.has2BRor1BRDenDetail: 2BR floor plans confirmed (Hawthorn and Olympia plans; 957-1,203 sq ft). No 1BR+den plan name found in available sources; floor plan names are Bayberry and Duxbury for 1BR. Absence of a named den plan does not rule one out, but none was confirmed.
notes.inUnitLaundryDetail: In-unit washer/dryer confirmed across multiple listing sources and resident reviews. One resident noted washer cycles run short. All units appear to include washer/dryer (not connections only, per VeryApt listing).
notes.unitClimateDetail: Air conditioning confirmed as a unit feature. Resident reviews note 'very up to date with appliances and A/C.' Individual thermostat control vs. building-managed chilled water system not confirmed explicitly; rated Yes (in-unit control assumed for a luxury 2017 building with this profile, but verify with leasing).
notes.petDetail: Cats and dogs welcome. Up to 2 pets per home. Weight limit approximately 100 lbs. Breed restrictions apply (Pit Bulls, Rottweilers, Huskies listed). One-time fee and monthly pet rent apply; exact amounts not confirmed in scraped data. Dog park and pet grooming station on-site.
notes.wellMaintainedDetail: Rated 4.5 out of 5 across 202 resident reviews (ApartmentRatings). Reviewers consistently describe professional staff, responsive 24-hour emergency maintenance, and a well-kept building. One reviewer flagged power outages during storms as the main complaint.
notes.phoneNote: Primary phone from liveatthepearl.com and search results is (301) 587-3275. A second number (681) 246-0832 appears on Rentable.co and may be a leasing-line variant.
